objective: Autopilot smoke test: execute a minimal script that prints Hello World and exits 0 so we can verify worker auto-claim, execution, result write, and git push flow after TASK-0016 policy checks.
admin_override_rule: Cross-worker execution denied without admin override password.
required_validation: Autopilot claims TASK-0017 only if required_worker_id matches worker_id
Executor script runs and prints Hello World
Autopilot commits and pushes result to origin/main
execution_instructions: Run on Ubuntu worker via autopilot
Do not execute any script other than executor_script
Capture stdout and stderr excerpts in result JSON
Commit message format: worker: autopilot result TASK-0017
